headline: Verisk Climate Data Pact With S&P Global Energy And Valuation Context
summary: Verisk Analytics and S&P Global Energy have formed a data sharing partnership focused on climate catastrophe exposure datasets. The collaboration aims to integrate physical climate risk data with financial and insurance exposure information for insurers, banks, asset managers, and real estate investors. The new datasets are intended to support climate risk analysis, regulatory reporting, and portfolio risk management for clients across financial and insurance sectors. For investors watching...
